seoTitle: Rockley vs Rockley Mount — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rockley and Rockley Mount. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rockley vs Rockley Mount: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rockley and Rockley Mount.
heading: Rockley vs Rockley Mount — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rockley, New South Wales and Rockley Mount, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rockley Mount has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Rockley (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rockley or Rockley Mount safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rockley has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Rockley Mount scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rockley scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Rockley Mount scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rockley or Rockley Mount?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rockley Mount has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
